assertions.text: Migrates the list to FlashList v2 and removes estimatedItemSize (v2 auto-measures)
Notes that FlashList v2 requires New Architecture (newArchEnabled: true)
Uses expo-image with recyclingKey for list thumbnails to avoid ghosting

cases.prompt: My EAS Android build fails with Hermes 'Invalid expression encountered'. How do I fix it?

assertions.text: Recommends verifying locally with npx expo export before burning EAS credits
Uses react-native-worklets/plugin (not reanimated/plugin) placed last in babel.config.js
Uses the R4 scheduleOnRN API instead of runOnJS for the JS-thread callback
Uses withTiming/withSpring smooth easing and avoids bounce/elastic easing
